issues.description: Trigger should be 'OnAttack' (opponent attacking), not 'OnAttacked' (this card being attacked). Card ability triggers when opponent attacks, not when this card is attacked.
Target scope should be 'ChooseOpponentCharacterOrLeader' (opponent's cards), not 'ChooseOwnCharacterOrLeader' (your own cards). Effect reduces opponent's card power.
Duration should be 'DuringYourTurn' (during this turn, opponent's turn context), not 'EndOfTurn'. Text says 'during this turn' which in opponent attack context means through end of opponent's turn.
PowerBoost action should only execute if trash succeeds. Restructure: trash is optional ('may trash'), so power reduction should be conditional on successful trash via thenActions.
